positive: A central, symmetrical circular motif featuring stylized bioluminescent flora, interwoven cosmic constellations, and delicate botanical filigree. The design must have crisp, clean lines and a strong, high-contrast silhouette against a deep, midnight indigo background. Focus on stylized lunar cycles and glowing magical pollen clusters. The overall aesthetic is intricate, elegant, and highly detailed, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets celestial cartography. Studio quality, vector art illustration, perfect for apparel print, dramatic lighting, 8k resolution.
